ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MojoLauncher/MojoLauncher
Language: java
A Minecraft: Java Edition launcher, based on PojavLauncher

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/gravitino
Language: java
World's most powerful open data catalog for building a high-performance, geo-distributed and federated metadata lake.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/lucene
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/lucene
Language: java
Apache Lucene open-source search software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/seatunnel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/seatunnel
Language: java
SeaTunnel is a multimodal, high-performance, distributed, massive data integration tool.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bazelbuild/bazel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bazelbuild/bazel
Language: java
a fast, scalable, multi-language and extensible build system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: camunda/camunda
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/camunda/camunda
Language: java
Process Orchestration Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: checkstyle/checkstyle
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/checkstyle/checkstyle
Language: java
Checkstyle is a development tool to help programmers write Java code that adheres to a coding standard. By default it supports the Google Java Style Guide and Sun Code Conventions, but is highly configurable. It can be invoked with an ANT task and a command line program.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dependency-check/DependencyCheck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dependency-check/DependencyCheck
Language: java
OWASP dependency-check is a software composition analysis utility that detects publicly disclosed vulnerabilities in application dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: googleapis/google-cloud-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/googleapis/google-cloud-java
Language: java
Google Cloud Client Library for Java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iBotPeaches/Apktool
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool
Language: java
A tool for reverse engineering Android apk files

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iflytek/astron-rpa
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iflytek/astron-rpa
Language: java
Agent-ready RPA suite with out-of-the-box automation tools. Built for individuals and enterprises.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
Language: java
AI低代码平台，支持「低代码 + 零代码」双模式：零代码 5 分钟搭建业务系统，低代码模式一键生成前后端代码。 内置AI 应用，支持AI聊天、知识库、流程编排、MCP与插件，支持各种模型。Skills能力实现：一句话画流程图、设计表单、生成系统。 引领 AI生成→在线配置→代码生成→手工合并的开发模式，解决Java项目80%的重复工作，快速提高效率，又不失灵活性。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain4j/langchain4j
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j
Language: java
LangChain4j is an idiomatic, open-source Java library for building LLM-powered applications on the JVM. It offers a unified API over popular LLM providers and vector stores, and makes implementing tool calling (including MCP support), agents and RAG easy. It integrates seamlessly with enterprise Java frameworks like Quarkus and Spring Boot.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lax1dude/eaglerxserver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lax1dude/eaglerxserver
Language: java

Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: java
Termux - a terminal emulator application for Android OS extendible by variety of packages.
